description: Write a Python program to analyze the MovieLens 100k dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/ml-100k/u.data (tab-separated: UserID, ItemID, Rating, Timestamp). The program must calculate the global average rating rounded to exactly two decimal places and the total count of 5-star ratings. Save the script to /home/ga/Documents/rating_analyzer.py and ensure it generates two output files: a plain text file at /home/ga/Documents/rating_summary.txt containing the average and 5-star count (labeled 'Average' and '5-Star'), and an HTML file at /home/ga/Documents/rating_summary.html with the same statistics in valid HTML format.
